name: Johnson's Algorithm
description: All-pairs shortest paths for sparse graphs using Bellman-Ford reweighting and Dijkstra.
intuition: Add a virtual node q connected to every node with weight 0. Run Bellman-Ford from q to get potentials h[v]. Reweight edges: w'(u,v) = w(u,v) + h[u] - h[v] ≥ 0. Run Dijkstra from each node on reweighted graph.
